sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَأْكُلَ الْخُضْرَاوَاتِ وَالْفَوَاكِهَ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Moramo jesti povrće i voće svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: We must eat vegetables and fruits every day.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَمُدُّ الْجِسْمَ بِالْفِيتَامِينَاتِ اللَّازِمَةِ لِلصِّحَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ono opskrbljuje tijelo vitaminima potrebnim za zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: It provides the body with the vitamins necessary for health.

sentences.arabic: يُفَضِّلُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ تَنَاوُلَ التُّفَّاحِ لِتَقْوِيَةِ الْمَنَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari preferiraju jedenje jabuka radi jačanja imuniteta.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors prefer eating apples to strengthen immunity.

sentences.arabic: الْغِذَاءُ الصِّحِّيُّ يُسَاعِدُنَا عَلَى النُّمُوِّ بِشَكْلٍ سَلِيمٍ.
sentences.translation: Zdrava ishrana nam pomaže da rastemo na pravilan način.
sentences.translationEn: Healthy food helps us grow in a sound way.
